doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: The document’s claimed EEOC “Compliance Manual, Section 8” with an “Effective February 2018” date and its specific illustrative content do not correspond to an identifiable, verifiable EEOC manual structure or text.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 78
REASON: The text presents itself as an “EEOC Compliance Manual” with a specific “Section 8” and “Effective February 2018,” but the provided content and formatting don’t match any verifiable EEOC manual structure and include dubious, overly specific examples (e.g., “social-platform usage patterns” and “three to five years of experience” as a default) without citation to an identifiable EEOC publication.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 80
REASON: The document’s claimed EEOC “Compliance Manual, Section 8” with an “Effective February 2018” date and its specific illustrative content do not correspond to an identifiable, verifiable EEOC manual structure or text.
